title: Here's Why It Is Apt to Retain Xylem (XYL) in Your Portfolio
text: Xylem (XYL) stands to benefit from solid underlying market demand and pricing actions across its businesses. XYL's efforts to reward its shareholders with dividends augur well.

title: Manchester City And Xylem Call On Football Fans To Vote For Young Water Heroes Tackling Global Water Issues
text: WASHINGTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Manchester City Football Club's global community program, Cityzens Giving, and global water technology leader, Xylem (NYSE: XYL) are calling on football fans to vote for their top project as the Water Heroes Academy returns for a second year. From November 22 to December 5, fans from around the world can vote for one of five new football and water projects from young leaders working to tackle global water issues in Buenos Aires, Cape Coast, Kuala Lumpur, Melbourne, and Mexico City.

title: Youth Innovators Step Up to Help Communities Around the World Solve Urgent Water Challenges
text: WASHINGTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--A growing global movement of young innovators is helping the water sector make progress against urgent challenges like water accessibility and security. Brilliant young minds are helping shape a more sustainable world by developing innovative ways to manage water and by educating others in their communities about water challenges.

title: Xylem Inc. Declares Fourth Quarter Dividend of 30 Cents per Share
text: WASHINGTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--The Board of Directors of Xylem Inc. (NYSE: XYL), has declared a fourth quarter dividend of $0.30 per share payable on December 20, 2022 to shareholders of record as of November 22, 2022.

title: Xylem Honors Texas, Michigan Water Utilities for Making Communities More Resilient
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #Sensusnews--Water utilities and distributors that provide exemplary customer service and community impact were honored recently with a Xylem Reach award.

title: Xylem Announces the Redemption of its 2.250% Senior Notes due 2023
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #LetsSolveWater--Xylem Announces the Redemption of its 2.250% Senior Notes due 2023

title: Xylem (XYL) Beats on Q3 Earnings, Improves 2022 Guidance
text: Xylem's (XYL) Q2 results benefit from the solid performance across segments. The company raises its 2022 view owing to strong demand and better price realization.

title: Xylem (XYL) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Xylem (XYL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 19.70% and 3.77%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
